title: The Nation – July - August 2026 - Part 2
content:
com. If the post office alerts us that your magazine is undeliverable, we have no further obligation unless we receive a corrected address within one year.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        The Nation is available on microfilm 3 When ordering a subscription, please allow four to six weeks for receipt of first issue and for all subscription transactions. Back issues available online for $9.99 plus S&H from: shop.thenation.

or call 1-800-333-8536. Return undeliverable Canadian addresses to Bleuchip International, PO Box 25542, London, ON N6C 6B2. Canada Post: Publications Mail Agreement No. 40612608.

Periodicals postage paid at New York, NY, and additional mailing offices. Subscription orders, changes of address, and all subscription inquiries:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     The Nation                                                                          , PO Box 384, Congers, NY 10920-0384; The Nation (ISSN 0027-8378) produces 12 issues per year, which may include special double issues, by The Nation Company, LLC                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  , 520 Eighth Avenue, New York, NY 10018;
